productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Red & Charcoal T-shirt
description: Style NoteOne casual garment that'll make you look sophisticated in an instant is this T-shirt from status quo. The quirky print on the chest renders a subtle charm to the tee, while the soft blended fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team it with jeans and sports shoes for a touch of style.Product DetailsRed and charcoal grey polo t-shirt, has a charcoal grey spread collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, branding embroidered and appliqued on the left chest and a vented hemMaterial and CareBlended fabricMachine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
